notes: Alfred Linux 7.77 — sovereign desktop from Debian Trixie with Linux kernel.org 7.0.1 tree, Omahon Seal, and 42 Kingdom live-build hooks (Matthew 1:17 lineage; exactly one config/hooks/live/*.hook.chroot per lineage stage — superseded stages merged into parent files such as voice stack under 0400, sacred stillness under 0720). ISO builds run scripts/sync-canonical-to-build.sh before lb config (hooks + package-lists + packages.chroot + build-assets; Docker inner sets ALFRED_FULL_BUILD_ASSETS=1). AKJV — Perez Family Edition under /usr/share/alfred/bible/. Bible tongues: hook 0292 embeds languages.conf with 4 seeded rows (en, es, fr, he) offline; api bible_tongues must match row count — expand the heredoc to add languages, then bump bible_tongues. AI: Omahon + Ollama primary; optional ai-providers.env for cloud APIs — backup only. First-boot TTS/he per README.
